creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-01-10 15:09:27 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/piwik            Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/piwik/files      pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Piwik is a downloadable, open source (GPL licensed) web analytics
  software package. It provides detailed reports on your website and
  its visitors, including the search engines and keywords they used,
  the language they speak, which pages they like, the files they
  download, and so much more.
  
  Piwik aims to be an open source alternative to Google Analytics.
  
  WWW: http://www.piwik.org/
  
  PR:             ports/130074
  Submitted by:   Wen heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2229    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/www/piwik/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/piwik/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/www/piwik/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/www/piwik/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +1391 -0   ports/www/piwik/pkg-plist (new)
